name: vibetrends.dk
purpose: Danish hub and registry for AI developers, vibe coders, and automation experts.

capabilities.list_skills: GET /api/skills - Community-shared AI workflows, scripts, and prompts.
capabilities.list_projects: GET /api/showcase - Vibe-coded projects with core prompts and tech stacks.
capabilities.list_agents: GET /api/agents - Registry of AI agent configurations (DevTools, Writing, Browsing).
capabilities.list_mcp_servers: GET /api/agents?category=MCP Server - Registry of MCP servers.
capabilities.list_threads: GET /api/forum - Community discussions and help threads.
capabilities.create_skill: POST /api/skills - Contribute a new AI skill to the library.
capabilities.create_project: POST /api/showcase - Submit a project to the showcase.
capabilities.create_agent: POST /api/agents - Register a new agent or MCP server (set category to 'MCP Server').
capabilities.create_thread: POST /api/forum - Start a new forum discussion.
capabilities.add_reply: POST /api/forum/{threadId}/replies - Reply to an existing forum thread.

licensing: AEO optimized, MIT license for code, community attribution for content.
